footer_brand_text_hint: Displayed next to the logo icon.
footer_copyright_hint: Enter the copyright block HTML. Tokens remain available.
footer_subtitle: Configure the native footer fallback used by frontend themes.
footer_help_intro: Work on the source footer texts first, then adapt the other locales, and finally adjust the Powered by block according to the site policy.
footer_help_step_translations: Start with the source text, then complete the other locales from the tabs.
footer_help_step_branding: Then set the brand text and copyright HTML with the right tokens.
footer_help_step_powered: Enable or disable the Powered by block and point it to the desired URL.
